steps.t: The Thirsty Seer is in the Fifth Circle of Minas Tirith. The picnic lunch that Pippin ordered should be ready for you to pick up and carry to the Watc…
Pippin is waiting for you at the Watch-point on the end of the pier at the top of Minas Tirith.
You are sharing a delicious picnic with Pippin at the Watch-point atop the city.
You are sharing a delicious picnic with Pippin at the Watch-point atop the city.
You are sharing a delicious picnic with Pippin at the Watch-point atop the city. The hobbit became very evasive when recounting the reason for his jou…
You are sharing a delicious picnic with Pippin at the Watch-point atop the city. The hobbit became very evasive when recounting the reason for his jou…
You are sharing a delicious picnic with Pippin at the Watch-point atop the city. He has reluctantly begun to tell you what brought him to Minas Tirith…
Your picnic at the Watch-point is done, and now it is time to clean it up.
Pippin has returned to his post in the Citadel, the Seventh Circle of the city.
